title.en: God of War True Country, Forbidden Mountains.

content.en:
The news of the Forbidden Mountain Range spread quickly, and the major forces had been investigating the matter of the Forbidden Treasure Land, so the news was quickly known by those Upper Triple Heaven forces and Middle Triple Heaven forces.

As a result, the Tianhai Sect, the Mitian Sect, and the Ten Thousand Domains Divine Temple sent a large number of True Ancestors to come.

Not to be outdone, the other forces mobilized a large number of True Ancestors one after another, trying to compete for the opportunity of the Forbidden Mountain Range.

God of War True Country, Forbidden Mountains.

Ye Tian belonged to the first batch of True Ancestors to arrive, and he saw that many True Ancestors had already appeared in the Forbidden Mountain Range, some of them were the True Ancestors of the God of War Temple, and some of them were the scattered cultivators of the God of War True Kingdom.

They also want to obtain forbidden treasures, so they risk their lives to find them.

However, some people quickly resist their greed and retreat when they find a forbidden treasure, but most are reluctant to retreat.

The Forbidden Mountain Range was too big, completely in another void, and Ye Tian couldn't get all the True Ancestors to leave the Forbidden Mountain Range.

As a result, he could only transmit his voice throughout the Forbidden Mountains.

"I am the Ten Thousand Law True Ancestors, all the True Ancestors have left the Forbidden Mountain Range, otherwise those True Ancestors of the Upper Triple Heaven Force will come, and once they fight, you will all die!"

Ye Tian reminded.

Some True Ancestors listened to it and quickly retreated, but there were still a considerable number of True Ancestors who did not leave.

Ye Tian didn't care about this.

He knew very well that the Temple of the Gods would definitely send True Ancestor to arrive afterwards, and he would not give up the forbidden treasures at all, even if he filled it with his life, he would take away as many forbidden treasures as possible.

He did not have a forbidden mountain range, but stood outside the forbidden mountain range, waiting for the arrival of the True Ancestor of the other forces.

The first to arrive were the true ancestors of the Zixia Sect, they were relatively close to the God of War True Kingdom, and they were the first true ancestors to get the news, so they arrived quickly.

The two invincible True Ancestors, Zi Chi True Ancestor and Zi Gang True Ancestor, led a large number of True Ancestors to descend, but they were stopped by Ye Tian alone.

"Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, what are you doing without entering the Forbidden Mountain Range and stopping us?"

Zigang True Ancestor was a little jealous.

"I'm not stopping you!" Ye Tian said solemnly: "I just don't want anyone to destroy the God of War True Country, you can enter the Forbidden Mountain Range, but even if you fight, you can only do it in the Forbidden Mountain Range, if someone dares to fight in the God of War True Country, don't blame me for making a move!"

"Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, who do you think you are, can you still control all the True Ancestors?"

Zigang True Ancestor sneered.

How is it possible to stop the True Ancestor from fighting?

For example, if a true ancestor obtains a treasure and escapes from the forbidden mountain range, and others chase and kill him, this can't be stopped?

The birth of the Forbidden Mountain Range not only caused a serious fight within the Forbidden Mountain Range, but even the God of War True Kingdom outside the Forbidden Mountain Range was bound to be extremely serious.

Countless True Ancestors were fighting, and it was not at all that an invincible True Ancestor in Ye Tian could stop them.

Moreover, if there is really a forbidden treasure born, or even some top-level and precious forbidden strange things are born, I am afraid that it will cause Dao Ancestor to forcibly take action.

Just an invincible true ancestor, it's good to be able to save his life, and dare to threaten other forces?

"Don't believe me, you try?"

Ye Tian threatened.

At this moment, some True Ancestors flew out of the Forbidden Mountain Range.

They were ready to leave the Forbidden Mountains, but someone didn't want them to leave.

Swish!

A Supreme True Ancestor attacked an Elite True Ancestor in an attempt to kill the Elite True Ancestor in order to obtain the forbidden artifacts on his body.

In the eyes of this Supreme True Ancestor, coming out of the Forbidden Mountain Range, he must have obtained a forbidden strange thing.

"That's the strongest True Ancestor of the Heavenly Sword Sect of the Eight Heavenly Forces, do you dare to kill it?" Zigang True Ancestor saw it and said with a smile.

Ye Tian's cold eyes froze, and a forbidden spear appeared in his hand, instantly crossing a long distance, directly nailing the hand-moving Supreme True Ancestor into the void.

This blow directly killed the opponent in seconds!

Instantly killing a Supreme True Ancestor, Zigang True Ancestor and Zi Chi True Ancestor were dumbfounded.

"How do you feel that his strength is stronger than before?" the two were puzzled, "Impossible, he is already the ultimate of the Invincible True Ancestor, and there is no way to improve it, it must be an illusion, or this is the effect of his full strength!"

"Whoever dares to make a move in the God of War True Kingdom will die!"

Ye Tian's voice permeated the surroundings, shaking the endless void.

He knew that many True Ancestors had already come, hidden around, and he was not in a hurry to enter the Forbidden Mountain Range, and it didn't matter if he delayed a little time.

Among them, there are also a considerable number of true ancestors who are trying to intercept and kill the true ancestors of the God of War True Kingdom, after all, the true ancestors of the God of War True Kingdom are very weak, and they can easily kill them, so as to obtain the forbidden treasures on their bodies, which can save a lot of time.

Ye Tian's arrogance aroused the anger of many True Ancestors, but ordinary True Ancestors didn't dare to provoke Ye Tian at all, after all, Ye Tian had just killed a Supreme True Ancestor in seconds!

"Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, you dare to kill our Heavenly Sword Sect's strongest True Ancestor!!"

The true ancestors of the Heavenly Sword Gate have descended.

The person who opened his mouth was the Wind Sword Venerable, a top-notch invincible true ancestor.

This time, many True Ancestors descended on the Heavenly Sword Gate, among which there were two Invincible True Ancestors alone, and there were dozens of Supreme True Ancestors, almost half of the strength of the Heavenly Sword Gate.

With so many True Ancestors facing Ye Tian, an invincible True Ancestor, they naturally didn't hesitate.

No matter how strong Ye Tian is, can he still be stronger than so many of their True Ancestors?

"Wind Blade Venerable, do you dare to give it a try?"

Ye Tian threatened.

"Okay, what's wrong with me?"

From a distance, the Wind Sword Venerable saw a True Ancestor attack from the Forbidden Mountain Range, and his body moved to break through the void and kill the True Ancestor.

Then.

Ye Tian also made a move, intercepting the Wind Sword Venerable at an extremely fast speed, and immediately a Thousand Dao Techniques Ten Thousand True Spears instantly pierced.

Ye Tian's speed was too fast, almost beyond the reaction limit of the Wind Sword Venerable.

Burst!

The Ten Thousand Evil True Spear penetrated into the body of the Wind Sword Venerable, and a terrifying force erupted

The expression of the Wind Sword Venerable changed greatly, and he used a retreat technique to retreat quickly.

Back on the side of the Heavenly Sword Gate, he took a look at his body, and a big hole appeared in his chest, not only that, but his vitality was cut off at once.

That's almost a serious injury!

"Hurt me with one blow, how is this possible!"

The Wind Blade Venerable said in fear.

In fact, Ye Tian could kill him in one move, but he didn't do that!

If he kills the Wind Sword Venerable, I am afraid that the Heavenly Sword Gate will fight with him endlessly, and even lead out the Dao Ancestor of the Heavenly Sword Gate.

At that time, it would be difficult for him to protect the God of War True Kingdom.

What he wants now is deterrence, as long as these True Ancestors are not fighting frantically in the God of War True Kingdom, just a small situation battle will not destroy the God of War True Kingdom.

In that case, his goal will be accomplished.

Otherwise, there is no one to deter the Quartet, and they don't care about anything when they fight, in that case, the God of War True Kingdom will really be finished.

"Wind Sword Venerable, I really can't compete with your Heavenly Sword Sect alone, but as long as I pay the price, I can be sure to kill you, do you believe it or not?"

Ye Tian threatened.

“......"

The Wind Blade Venerable was silent.

Before, he may not have believed it, but Ye Tian's shot just now made him believe it.

Ye Tian's speed was too fast, he couldn't react at all, even if he prepared in advance, he couldn't dodge Ye Tian's attack.

Moreover, Ye Tian's attack was too terrifying, as if he had broken the limit of the Invincible True Ancestor, but he didn't really break it.

This was the most powerful and terrifying Invincible True Ancestor he had ever seen!

"Okay, I'll give you this face, the disciples of the Heavenly Sword Sect won't fight in the God of War True Kingdom for the time being!"

On the other side, the Zi Gang True Ancestor of the Zixia Sect also hurriedly said, "I also promise not to make a move, and not to destroy the God of War True Kingdom." "

Obviously, the true ancestors of the Zixia Sect were also afraid.

Woohoo!!!

The True Ancestors of the Heavenly Sword Sect and the Zixia Sect entered the Forbidden Mountain Range one by one, and there was no longer any True Ancestor who came out of the Forbidden Mountain Range.

And the true ancestors of some other forces also saw Ye Tian's strength, and they all entered the Forbidden Mountain Range in a low-key manner.

The Forbidden Mountain Range is like another side of the world, which can withstand the aftermath of the battle, as long as it is not too powerful to attack, it is difficult to affect the God of War True Kingdom.

Therefore, Ye Tian didn't care about the situation inside.

He only guarded outside the Forbidden Mountain Range, delaying time with the creatures of the God of War True Kingdom and letting these creatures withdraw, otherwise once the apocalyptic scene of the Konjac True Kingdom was staged, all the people of the God of War True Kingdom would die.

Time passed little by little, and one by one the big forces arrived, and they entered the forbidden mountain range one after another.

The knitting groups of the Mitian Sect, the Tianhai Sect, and the Ten Thousand Domains Temple also arrived, and there was no conflict with Ye Tian, maybe it was unnecessary.

I have to say that Ye Tian temporarily deterred all forces with his own strength, and all the true ancestors who dared to make trouble were killed by him.

Even four or five invincible true ancestors were not convinced, and they were also suppressed by him by himself, completely deterring the Quartet, and no one dared to make trouble anymore.

But Ye Tian knew very well that once he reached the late stage, he couldn't control so many True Ancestors, and the battle would still break out.

But there was no way, he could only delay time like this.

In addition, Ye Tian copied a body and entered the Forbidden Mountain Range as the Nine Extremes General, and he also went to collect the resources of the Forbidden Mountain Range and hunt the Forbidden Blood Creature.

After all, it was impossible for him not to collect forbidden treasures in order to keep the true kingdom of the God of War.

In this way, time passed day by day, and with the help of many True Ancestors of the Temple of the Gods, they quickly moved the creatures of the God of War True Kingdom to other True Kingdoms one by one.

Of course, there are some people who are reluctant to leave, and the Temple of the Gods will not forcibly drive them away.

Seven days later, the migration task was almost complete.

God of War True Country, Headquarters.

The former Yunzi Divine Maiden, and now the Yunzi True Ancestor is still here.

"Master, it's time to leave!"

One of Yun Zi True Ancestor's servants said.

"No, I'm going to enter the Forbidden Mountain Range!" muttered Yun Zi True Ancestor.

"What!"

The servants were shocked and hurriedly persuaded Yun Zi True Ancestor.

The Forbidden Mountain Range is so dangerous, even the Supreme True Ancestor can't save his life when he enters there, and although the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden has had a lot of opportunities and amazing adventures recently, she has only stepped into the ranks of the top True Ancestors so far.

It was too dangerous to enter the Forbidden Mountain Range with the strength of the top True Ancestor, and it would fall if you didn't put your mind to it.

This time, the True Ancestors of the Temple of the Gods who dared to enter the Forbidden Mountain Range were all True Ancestors who had not made progress for a long time and had exhausted their potential, so they dared to fight for their lives.

And Yun Zi True Ancestor has great potential, and is even expected to be the strongest True Ancestor, so there is no need to fight for his life!

"You don't have to worry about it, I've made up my mind!"

Yun Zi True Ancestor said coldly.

In an instant, she tore through the void and left, heading for the Forbidden Mountains.
